title: Craftable Passive Mob Spawn Eggs
description: Craftable Spawn Eggs, now possible! With this mod you can now craft spawn eggs
body:
# DESCRIPTION
This datapack makes some of the Passive Mob Spawn Eggs craftable. The craftable spawn eggs in this version are:
- Sheep
- Cow
- Pig
- Chicken

# INSTALLATION GUIDE
go to your saves folder located here on Windows:

```
C:\Users(your name)\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves
```
put the zipped file in the datapack folder, and either restart or execute the command /reload 

# RECIPES

![Cow Spawn Egg Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/496aee28dfd2e5eb5460e131df2ccc66af5fb4d0.png)

![Chicken Spawn Egg Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd4a465c819d07afa5ab4d1709f9f5b59dc47d6b.png)

![Pig Spawn Egg Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7254a21d2323240dc92d25d33d0c337111cbbf2.png)

![Sheep Spawn Egg Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dff76ca57b1a8875d401f754356761ef760343e9.png)

# OTHERS
Feel free to ask any doubts or problems regarding this datapack, hit me up on discord at @oshielder
